ddls:
CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the episode */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the episode */,
  "us_viewers_millions" REAL /* Number of U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief description of the episode */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Estimated budget for the episode */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Estimated revenue generated by the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_number FOREIGN KEY ("season_number") REFERENCES seasons ("season_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the series */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year the season was released */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewer_stats" (
  "viewer_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer statistic */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were recorded */,
  "viewer_count" INTEGER /* Number of viewers */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the episode */,
  "demographic_info" TEXT /* Demographic information of viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewer_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_stats_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the television series */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series */,
  "release_year" TEXT /* Year the series was first released */,
  "network" TEXT /* The television network that airs the series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the series */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id", "writer_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the director of the episode
